title: Evangelion Items including limited editions FOR SALE
display_title: Evangelion Items including limited editions FOR SALE
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Items (including limited editions) - FOR SALE             Quote Post by Alpine » Sun Feb 05, 2012 1:00 am Hello All, I've been meaning to do this for a while... but haven't had any serious time until now-ish The fact is, I'm planning to move/need more space for other collectibles & want to sell off some of my dear Eva items. Many of these are limited edition collectibles/out-of-print, or as the Japanese call them, 'first-pressing editions' Anyhoo, was going to post them on eBay, but thought I would give the fan-base here a chance to express their interest. So here is a brief list! MUSIC CDs: - Evangelion OST CDs Vols. 1 to 3 (Mint condition) - Evangelion: Addition OST (Mint condition) - Death OST (Mint condition) - End of Evangelion OST (Mint condition) [s]- Evangelion S2 Works by Sagisu Shiro - 7 disc set including Evangelion telephone card (Mint condition; card never opened)[/s] ** SOLD ** - The Day of Second Impact OST (Mint condition) ** All individual CDs (except Addition ) have the original obi strips included MODEL KITS: - Fujimi A310 V6 Kit - Misato's kit, with resin figurines of Misato and Rei (NEW, and no longer available) [s] BOOKS: - Evangelion Newtype Film Books Vols. 1 to 3 (NEW, out-of-print) - Death Newtype Film Book (NEW, out-of-print) - End of Evangelion Newtype Film Books (NEW, out-of-print) - Eva Design Concept Works (high-quality sketch books with concept art of the Eva models with commentary, in Japanese - NEW; Ref: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Sore_o_Nasumono) - Eva Photo File: Eve 2015 (Images of the female characters of the Eva TV series - NEW, out-of-print with original dust jackets!) - Eva Photo File: Adam 2015 (Images of the male characters from the Eva TV series - NEW, out-of-print with original dusk jackets!) - Newtype 100% Collection (NEW, out-of-print; Ref: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion_Newtype_100%25_Collection) - Shinji, Rei, Asuka & Kaworu Photograph Books (4 books with character monologues, in Japanese, NEW and out-of-print) - Evangelion TV storyboard book Volume 1 (NEW, out-of-print) [/s] ** All books have the original dust jackets and obi strips included (if originally present) ** ALL BOOKS SOLD ** VIDEO: - Gainax Second Impact Box Set 1 - Gainax Second Impact Box Set 2 - Gainax Second Impact Box Set 3 (includes movies and 'Girlfriend of Steel' PC game) **The Second Impact Box Sets are the ONLY official releases of the unabridged, broadcast version of the TV series ever released. Limited Edition; all MINT condition** ** Second Impact Boxes have the original obi strips included [s]- Evangelion: 1.01 First-pressing Edition DVD with film cel bonus (Limited Edition, Mint condition; retains original shrink wrap with FILM CEL UNOPENED)[/s] ** SOLD ** - End of Evangelion LD Box Set (the famous Limited Edition LD Box with all the extra goodies - in mint condition with original package sleeve; only the LDs have been opened, other goodies are unopened - that includes the book, UFO catcher doll of the EVA-05 model, the EVA-01 model kit, glow-in-the-dark Rei resin model and the 3 telephone cards) MISCELLANEOUS: [s]- 2 sets of the original Eva trading cards (NEW) in their original trading sleeves[/s] ** SOLD ** As you can see, this is a fair bit, and I'm not sure I've listed everything - it's a rough list!!! All my items are Japanese ORIGINALS, I was rather purist and avoided international licensed editions where I could Because of the number of items, I haven't posted photos, but I am happy to provide whatever images upon request When I say 'Mint condition', it means that - all the items are in original packaging and were literally handled with gloves... If you are interested, let me know via PM and we can correspond I also have other anime items from the other series that you can enquire about: RahXephon Noir Nadia: Secret of Blue Water Top wo Nerae! Gunbuster Studio Ghibli Gunslinger Girl Blue Submarine 6 Ghost in the Shell Robot Carnival Oh My Goddess[/i]

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Sun Feb 05, 2012 12:04 pm I think you should: 1) Post the items on ebay with an auction time set to a couple of days. 2) Post about the ebay sales on the forums, and link to them. The people who really want your item are searching ebay 24/7 for it to see if anyone added it yet. So putting it on ebay is fair. The forum goers on the other hand, want the item for a way-cheaper price and don't want to compete with ebayers, but to be honest, that's just ripping yourself off. The people who want your items are probably collectors as well who'd resell it for more than you'd ever think to sell it for (without feeling a drop of guilt). So why be nice to them? Rip them off like they rip off others. Have them compete with other ebayers, get the most out of your investment.

[]:             Quote Post by Alpine » Sun Feb 05, 2012 5:49 pm I think you should: 1) Post the items on ebay with an auction time set to a couple of days. 2) Post about the ebay sales on the forums, and link to them. The people who really want your item are searching ebay 24/7 for it to see if anyone added it yet. So putting it on ebay is fair.
